title: citharexylum fruticosum var. villosum
intro: Citharexylum fruticosum var. villosum, also known as the hairy mountain silverbell, is a plant species that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Citharexylum fruticosum var. villosum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
